title: Disable Glow
description: This Resource pack disable glowing effect on mobs and players.
body:
## Ru
Этот ресурспак убирает эффект свечение:

![С ресурс паком](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8d5878835641f993ac8771c6c2dfcaf4fc623b2.png)**С ресурспаком**![Без него](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/190c762052093cd9e77f5086ffc2e40e584e59cb.png) **Без него**

## En
This resource pack disabled effect glowing:

![With resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8d5878835641f993ac8771c6c2dfcaf4fc623b2.png)**With resource pack**![Without resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/190c762052093cd9e77f5086ffc2e40e584e59cb.png) **Without resource pack**
